query:
SELECT 
  id, 
  title, 
  imageUrl, 
  thumbnailUrl, 
  imageKey,
  dimensions,
  technique
FROM works 
WHERE imageUrl IS NOT NULL 
ORDER BY id 
LIMIT 200;
